emails.welcome.title: Chào mừng đến với Catalyst Explorer!
emails.welcome.body:
Cảm ơn bạn đã đăng ký với Catalyst Explorer.

Chúng tôi hân hạnh chào mừng bạn đến với Catalyst Explorer, một công cụ toàn diện được thiết kế để giúp bạn khám phá, theo dõi và tham gia với các đề xuất dưới Project Catalyst, quỹ đổi mới phi tập trung của Cardano.

Với tài khoản mới của bạn, bạn có thể:

- Xem và phân tích các đề xuất trong thời gian thực
- Đánh dấu và tổ chức các mục quan tâm
- Gửi đề xuất riêng của bạn để cộng đồng xem xét
- Giám sát tiến độ tài trợ, danh mục và xu hướng bỏ phiếu
- Quản lý sở thích và cảnh báo thông qua bảng điều khiển cá nhân

Để bắt đầu, vui lòng đăng nhập và khám phá các công cụ hiện có sẵn cho bạn.
emails.welcome.signature:
Chúng tôi đánh giá cao sự quan tâm của bạn và mong chờ sự tham gia của bạn trong việc định hình tương lai của quản trị phi tập trung.

**Trân trọng,**
**Đội ngũ Catalyst Explorer**

emails.password_reset.title: Đặt lại Mật khẩu của Bạn - Catalyst Explorer
emails.password_reset.body: Bạn nhận được email này vì chúng tôi đã nhận được yêu cầu đặt lại mật khẩu cho tài khoản của bạn.
emails.password_reset.expiry_notice: Liên kết đặt lại mật khẩu này sẽ hết hạn sau **60 phút**.\n\nNếu bạn không yêu cầu đặt lại mật khẩu, không cần thực hiện hành động nào thêm.

workflows.catalystDrepSignup.objectivesP: Write about your values and your approach to governance...
workflows.catalystDrepSignup.qualificati: What makes your qualified for this role in catalyst
workflows.catalystDrepSignup.2roundsRule: To proceed, you need to have participated in at least 2 cayalyst voting rounds.
workflows.catalystDrepSignup.hasCatalyst: To proceed, you need to have a catalyst profile linked to this connected wallet.
workflows.catalystDrepSignup.signMessage: Sign so we can verify your wallet ownership.
workflows.catalystDrepSignup.willMaintai: I agree to store correctly this information and to maintain it
workflows.catalystDrepSignup.createAccou:
1. If you already have an account, log in with your credentials.
2. If you’re new, sign up using your email and create a secure password.
3. Verify your email to activate your account.
workflows.catalystDrepSignup.connectWall:
1. Choose a supported Cardano wallet (e.g., Yoroi, Daedalus, Eternl).
2. Follow the prompts to connect your wallet securely.
3. We will use the wallet to verify that you have participated in atleast 2 catalyst funding voting rounds after which you will be able to proceeed with your signup.
4. Click 'Next' to sign the message with your wallet.
workflows.catalystDrepSignup.signWalletI:
1. Approve a one-time sign message action to verify your wallet ownership.
2. This action does not transfer funds but links your wallet to your DRep account.
3. Follow the wallet instructions to complete the signing process.
workflows.catalystDrepSignup.successStep: Your wallet has been added to this drep account.
workflows.catalystDrepSignup.successInfo:
1. If successful, you’ll see a confirmation message, and your DRep account will be active.
2. If there’s an error, check for:
* Incorrect wallet connection
* Network delays or errors
3. Retry or contact support if issues persist.
workflows.catalystDrepSignup.platformSta: Platform Statement. Let the community know who you are and what you stand for.

1. Introduce yourself as a DRep and outline your governance principles.
2. Explain why ADA holders should delegate to you.
3. Support multiple languages to reach a global audience.

This helps streamline governance participation. Ready to begin? In the next steps, you'll name your list, add proposals, and explain your rationale for selecting them.

workflows.bookmarks.intro:
Before you start, let’s set up your Bookmark List. A bookmark list is a personalized collection of saved items, allowing you to easily organize, access, and manage content that matters to you. Ready to begin?

*In the next steps, you’ll name your list, add your list, and explain your rationale for selecting them.*

dreps.drepList.title: DReps Directory
dreps.drepList.subtitle: Delegate Representatives in Project Catalyst.
dreps.drepList.signUp: Sign up to be a DRep
dreps.faq.answer1: A DRep (Delegate Representative) is a trusted community member who votes on governance proposals on behalf of ADA holders.
dreps.faq.question2: Why should I delegate my voting power?
dreps.faq.answer2: Delegation allows you to have a say in Cardano's governance without having to review and vote on every proposal yourself.
dreps.faq.question3: How do I choose a DRep?
dreps.faq.answer3: You can select a DRep based on their values, expertise, and voting history. Browse profiles and pick one that aligns with your vision for Cardano.
dreps.faq.answer4: Yes, you can re-delegate your voting power to a different DRep anytime.
dreps.faq.answer5: Yes, delegation is secure. Your ADA never leaves your wallet, and you maintain full control over your funds.
dreps.faq.question6: Do I earn rewards for delegating?
dreps.faq.answer6: Currently, delegation is focused on governance participation, not financial rewards.
dreps.faq.answer7: DReps carefully analyze proposals, ensuring informed, high-quality votes that benefit the Cardano ecosystem.
dreps.landing.title: Shape the Future of Cardano, Delegate to a DRep Today!
dreps.landing.subtitle: Delegate Representatives (DReps) are community members who represent the interests of the community in Project Catalyst. They are elected by the community to participate in the governance of the Catalyst ecosystem.
dreps.landing.signUp: Sign up to be a DRep
dreps.landing.drepDescription: DReps (Delegate Representatives), vote on governance proposals in Cardaon on behalf of ADA holders. Instead of voting individually, you can delegate your voting power to a DRep who represents your interests helping shape the future of Cardano efficiently and transparently.
dreps.landing.projectCatalyst: Project Catalyst's Continued Growth and the Need for Delegation
dreps.landing.projectCatalystDescription: The Cardano community's Project Catalyst has grown rapidly, with Fund8 receiving nearly 1,000 proposals. To manage this increasing workload, a new delegation system is being introduced for sustainable governance.
dreps.landing.empowerDescription: Delegation allows ADA holders to assign their voting power to DReps, ensuring their voices are heard across more proposals. DReps enhance decision-making in Project Catalyst by voting on most proposals.
dreps.landing.excite: Excited for for DReps in catalyst?
dreps.connectWallet: Please connect your wallet to continue
